title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Using CTAB-PVP-TRIzol Method
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.4q5gvy6

steps.title: Grind tissue to a powder in liquid nitrogen
steps.instruction: Grind tissue to a powder in liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Add 200 mg – 500 mg...
steps.instruction: Add 200 mg – 500 mg of ground tissue to 3.0 mL of pre-heated extraction buffer in a 5 ml tube.

steps.title: Vortex the tube until the tissue...
steps.instruction: Vortex the tube until the tissue is mixed with the buffer.

steps.title: Incubate the tube at 65 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate the tube at 65 °C for 00:30:00 , vortexing briefly ( 00:00:15 ) every 2–3 min during the incubation.

steps.title: Aliquot the mixture into four 2...
steps.instruction: Aliquot the mixture into four 2 ml RNase free tubes, 1 mL in each tube.

steps.title: Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 in a centrifuge
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 in a centrifuge. All of the insoluble matter should form a pellet at the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Pour the supernatant into a new 2 ml tube
steps.instruction: Pour the supernatant into a new 2 ml tube.

steps.title: Add an equal volume of 24:1...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of 24:1 chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to fill the tube.

steps.title: Vortex tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy
steps.instruction: Vortex tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy.

steps.title: Spin the tubes at for 00:10:00 in a centrifuge
steps.instruction: Spin the tubes at for 00:10:00 in a centrifuge.

steps.title: Transfer the upper aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper aqueous phase to new 2 ml RNase free tubes.

steps.title: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to new 2 ml RNase free tubes.

steps.title: Spin tubes at for 00:20:00 in...
steps.instruction: Spin tubes at for 00:20:00 in a centrifuge and decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Add 1 mL 75 % cooled ethanol to the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL 75 % cooled ethanol to the pellet.

steps.title: Spin the tube at maximum speed...
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at maximum speed for 00:05:00 in a centrifuge.

steps.title: Open cap and air-dry the pellet
steps.instruction: Open cap and air-dry the pellet.

steps.title: Add 30 µL RNase free water to dissolve the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 30 µL RNase free water to dissolve the pellet.

steps.title: Centrifuge at > for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at > for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to a new 2 ml RNase free tube.

steps.title: Spin tubes at > for 00:20:00...
steps.instruction: Spin tubes at > for 00:20:00 at 4 °C in a centrifuge.

steps.title: Decant the supernatant taking care not to lose the pellet
steps.instruction: Decant the supernatant taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:05:00 at >
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:05:00 at > .

steps.title: Repeat steps 21 and 22 one more time
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 21 and 22 one more time. go to step #21

steps.title: Open cap and air dry the pellet
steps.instruction: Open cap and air dry the pellet.

steps.title: Add 10 µL – 30 µL...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL – 30 µL RNase free water to dissolve the pellet.

steps.title: Decant the supernatant carefully
steps.instruction: Decant the supernatant carefully.

steps.title: Repeat steps 14 and 15 one more time
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 14 and 15 one more time. go to step #14

steps.title: Incubate at 20 °C for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 20 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Repeat steps 8 to 10 one more time
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 8 to 10 one more time. go to step #8

steps.title: Add 1/3 volume of 10 Molarity...
steps.instruction: Add 1/3 volume of 10 Molarity (M) LiCl to each tube.

steps.title: Mix and let stand at 4...
steps.instruction: Mix and let stand at 4 °C for 06:00:00 – 08:00:00 or overnight to precipitate RNA.

steps.title: Then add 300 µL TRIzol reagent...
steps.instruction: Then add 300 µL TRIzol reagent and equal volume of chloroform to TRIzol reagent (Invitrogen).

steps.title: Vortex vigorously and store at 20 °C for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Vortex vigorously and store at 20 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Add 2 volumes of cooled 100%...
steps.instruction: Add 2 volumes of cooled 100% ethanol, 1/10 volume of NaAc and 2 µL of glycogen.

steps.title: Mix and incubate at -20 °C for 02:00:00
steps.instruction: Mix and incubate at -20 °C for 02:00:00 .

steps.title: Add 1 mL 75 % ethanol to the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL 75 % ethanol to the pellet.

steps.title: Let tube stand at 20 °C for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Let tube stand at 20 °C for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Decant the liquid carefully, taking care...
steps.instruction: Decant the liquid carefully, taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual liquid and remove it with a pipette.
